# Reconstruction Instructions — Layout Skeleton

This file marks the canonical location for future packet-local reconstruction instructions.

This skeleton is not reconstructable release-grade evidence.

Future release-grade packets should explain how to reconstruct:

1. packet identity;
2. run identity;
3. status artifact identity;
4. policy and registry identity;
5. materialized gate set;
6. CI outcome;
7. release authority manifest;
8. audit bundle;
9. digest manifest;
10. field-point authority map;
11. evidence fold-in admissibility;
12. optional external, HPC, and recognition evidence.

This skeleton does not create release authority.
